1.premise: Refusing to call a transitioning child your son implies a new title, but reveals disownment.
Puberty blockers could be beneficial to pedophiles by preserving children's pre-pubescent appearance.
Voluntary puberty blockers could be a mockery of a little person's involuntary condition.
'Midget' sounds like 'fidget', and 'fidget' fits a person with ADHD.
School shootings could be the most effective puberty blocker.
White perpetrators of school shootings are widely understood but rarely called out directly.
After-school gun violence among Black youth could be an extracurricular activity.

lines.text: Folks, thank you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: My son just came out as trans.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Well, shouldn't call him my son anymore.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Now that he's dead to me,
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: they got him on puberty blockers
lines.label: setup

lines.text: or as pedophiles call them preservatives.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Fucking miracle medicine.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: The other day at my job,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was explaining puberty blockers to one of the midgets.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I work in a circus and...
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He goes, "There's people choosing to do this."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: (makes angry midget sound)
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Fucking calm down, Tyrion, you bigot."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You there, sir, let me ask you,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: what do you call a little person with ADHD?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's right, a fidget.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Good answer.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Speaking of little people,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I wanna switch topics to school shootings.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The ultimate puberty blocker and ...
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know, these shootings are often done by the same race.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm looking at you, honkies.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: White kids need to learn from their black classmates
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and save the shootings for after school.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: For them, it's an extracurricular activity.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Okay, thank you.
lines.label: fluff
